data_coverage_summary: Geotab Drive exposes driver-facing workflow context tied to vehicles, trips, compliance state, and in-cab interactions, so it can deliver assigned asset context, operational events, and controlled in-cab actions.
buyer_guidance: Use Geotab Drive when the integration needs driver-facing workflow context in addition to back-office fleet data, especially for in-cab user flows and controlled action prompts.
overview: The Geotab Drive integration reference is centered on extending the in-cab application experience for fleet execution. It is tied to vehicles and drivers, surfaces operational trip and compliance context, and supports controlled in-app actions and notifications. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Supported.

available_data.description: The Drive reference is aimed at extensions that operate inside the driver workflow and therefore has access to assigned vehicle context and active operational state.
data_points: Trip and route execution context presented in-cab
In-cab prompts, notifications, and action surfaces

ingest_considerations: Drive integrations are embedded in a driver-facing application flow, so identity, session scope, and device context matter more than for a purely server-side REST integration.
Write-enabled experiences should be governed so only approved workflows can trigger in-cab actions or prompts.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the Geotab Drive introduction and integration reference, which describe vehicle-linked in-cab workflows, operational context, and extension points for controlled user actions.
